page_metadata.biotools__summary: ZINClick is a virtual combinatorial database of over 16 million of 1,4-disubstituted-1,2,3-triazoles (Molecular Weight < 1000), each can be easily synthesized and it is at the same time new and patentable!
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ZINClick is a virtual combinatorial database of over 16 million of 1,4-disubstituted-1,2,3-triazoles (Molecular Weight < 1000), each can be easily synthesized and it is at the same time new and patentable!
